need: to authenticate with User ID and Password
outcome: I can access FirstBrief features securely
acceptance_criteria: • Given valid credentials, When I submit the login form, Then I am signed in and taken to the Dashboard. • Given invalid credentials, When I submit the login form, Then I see an error and remain on the login page.

need: the system to lock my account after a configurable number of failed logins and email a temporary password
outcome: my account is protected from brute-force attempts and I can regain access
acceptance_criteria: • Given my account reaches the max failed login attempts, When a further attempt occurs, Then the account is locked and a reset email is sent. • Given I log in with the temporary password, When authentication succeeds, Then I am forced to change my password.

need: to be required to change my password on first login and at configured intervals with complexity rules enforced
outcome: password hygiene is maintained
acceptance_criteria: • Given first login, When I authenticate, Then I must set a new compliant password before proceeding. • Given password expiry interval is reached, When I log in, Then I am prompted to change my password.

need: to log out with a confirmation screen listing messages accessed this session
outcome: I can verify my actions and end the session cleanly
acceptance_criteria: • Given I am logged in, When I click Logout, Then a confirmation page lists messages accessed this session. • When I confirm, Then my session ends and I return to the login page.

need: the account lock email to include a temporary password that I must use once and then change
outcome: I can regain access securely
acceptance_criteria: • Given my account is locked, Then the email contains a temporary password and first- login forces a change.

need: a dashboard landing page with menu items permitted by my role
outcome: I can quickly access the functions I am allowed to use
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I open the Dashboard, Then I see only the menu items my role allows. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: a list of mandatory messages effective since last login and forthcoming (colour-coded)
outcome: I can prioritise reading and clearance of urgent items
acceptance_criteria: • Given messages effective since last login, When I view the Dashboard, Then those appear in the Effective list. • Given messages due to become effective, When I view the list, Then they are highlighted in the pre-effective colour.

need: to view current Briefs of the Day for my Default Message Group (or all applicable when no default)
outcome: I can see key notices immediately after login
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I open the Dashboard, Then I see Briefs of the Day relevant to my groups. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: the Effective list to include mandatory messages that became effective since my last login regardless of current read state
outcome: I don’t miss items that turned effective while I was away
acceptance_criteria: • Given a message became effective since my last login, When I return, Then it appears in the Effective list whether Read or Read & Cleared.

need: columns for Message, Effective, Expires, Printed, Emailed with sortable headers
outcome: I can manage and audit my actions
acceptance_criteria: • Given the list, When I click a column header, Then the list sorts by that column.

need: to submit a BOTD with Title, Message Content (text), Release/Expiry, and target Message Groups
outcome: time-bounded notices are communicated to the right audiences
acceptance_criteria: • Given Release/Expiry are in the future and Expiry > Release, When I click Create, Then the BOTD is saved. • Given invalid dates, When I attempt to save, Then I see validation errors and the BOTD is not created.

need: to search BOTD by Title, Content, Message Group, and date ranges (Release/Expiry), including archived
outcome: I can find specific BOTD quickly
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I search with filters, Then I see matching BOTD results including optional archived. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: to edit/delete/restore BOTD with statuses Unreleased, Released, Archived
outcome: I can correct content and manage lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: • Given a BOTD Unreleased, When I edit dates/content/access, Then changes save with validations. • Given a BOTD Archived and I have permission, When I click Restore and set a future Expiry, Then it is restored.

need: released BOTD to be available automatically at its Release Date/Time without manual approval
outcome: I can see timely notices without admin delay
acceptance_criteria: • Given a BOTD with Release <= now, When I access BOTD, Then it is visible to targeted groups. • Given Release > now, When I access BOTD, Then it remains Unreleased until the scheduled time.

need: a Mandatory Messages list showing unread (bold), overdue (red), and future-effective (configurable colour)
outcome: I can prioritise mandatory reading and clearance
acceptance_criteria: • Given unread mandatory items, When I open the list, Then unread appear bold; overdue appear red; future-effective use the configured colour. • When I open a message, Then I can view it full width with actions (Print, Send, Feedback, Close).

need: to choose Read or Read & Clear when closing a mandatory message
outcome: I control whether it remains on my Mandatory list
acceptance_criteria: • Given I close a mandatory message, When I select Read, Then it remains on the Mandatory list. • Given I close a mandatory message, When I select Read & Clear, Then it moves to the Other Messages list.

need: to record cumulative read time for each mandatory message when closed
outcome: supervisors can audit the time spent reading
acceptance_criteria: • Given I read a mandatory message, When I close it, Then my cumulative read time is updated. • Given multiple sessions, When I read and close repeatedly, Then read time accumulates.

need: to print/email a message and send feedback (pre-populated metadata)
outcome: I can share or query message content and notify originators/admin
acceptance_criteria: • Given a message is open, When I click Print, Then a standard print dialog appears and the message prints. • Given a message is open and my account has an email address, When I click Send, Then I receive the message by email. • Given I click Feedback, When I submit subject/body, Then feedback is sent to the System Administrator and originator.

need: to sort columns and group by Message Sub Type with unread counts
outcome: I can navigate large lists efficiently
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click a column header, When the list refreshes, Then items are sorted by that column. • Given I enable categorisation, When the list renders, Then items group by Sub Type with unread counts.

need: to view non-mandatory and Read & Cleared items with display/print/feedback support
outcome: I can access reference content without clearance workflow
acceptance_criteria: • Given items exist, When I open Other Messages, Then unread are bold; actions mirror Mandatory except no close confirmation. • When I open and close an item, Then it remains in Other Messages.

need: Other Messages to support the same sorting/categorising by Sub Type as Mandatory
outcome: I can navigate non-mandatory items efficiently
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click a column header or enable categorisation, Then Other Messages behaves like Mandatory list.

need: to create an Instruction with ID, Title, Summary, Sub Type, Originated By, optional Approvers, and upload Display/Print PDFs (ID match configurable)
outcome: briefing material can be authored with correct metadata
acceptance_criteria: • Given Message ID is unique and required fields are complete, When I click Create, Then the Instruction is saved as Unapproved. • Given filename validation is enabled, When I upload PDFs, Then the filenames must equal the Message ID (with .pdf).

need: to set Release/Effective/Expiry and assign Message Group access as Prohibited/Mandatory/Allowed (at least one of Mandatory/Allowed)
outcome: distribution timing and audience are controlled
acceptance_criteria: • Given dates are set, When I save, Then validations enforce future dates and Expiry > Release and >= Effective. • Given access rights, When I save, Then at least one of Mandatory or Allowed must be present.

need: to send creation notifications to selected approvers and Sub Type distribution list
outcome: approvers are alerted to review content
acceptance_criteria: • Given an Instruction is created, When saved, Then notification emails are sent to approvers and configured lists.

need: to approve an Instruction with auto-adjust of past Release time and justification prompts when Effective/Expiry outside Sub Type bounds
outcome: published instructions comply with policy
acceptance_criteria: • Given Release < now, When I approve, Then Release is adjusted to current date/time. • Given Effective/Expiry outside min/max for the Sub Type, When I approve, Then the system prompts for justification and records it.

need: to manage statuses (Unapproved, Approved, Approved Pending Release, Released, Archived) with permitted actions (Approve/Unapprove/Edit/Restore/Delete)
outcome: instructions follow a controlled lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: • Given Approved Pending Release, When I have Unapprove permission, Then I can unapprove prior to Release. • Given Released, When I edit, Then title and release restrictions apply as per status rules. • Given Archived and I have permission, When I Restore with future Expiry, Then the message reactivates.

need: to send approval emails to configured distribution lists
outcome: stakeholders are informed of approvals
acceptance_criteria: • Given an Instruction is approved, When status changes, Then approval notifications are sent to configured recipients.

need: to view audit history for a message when permitted
outcome: I can trace who changed what and when
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have View Audit History permission, When I open the Audit tab, Then I see chronological change records.

need: to search by ID, Title, Summary, Display Content, Group, Sub Type, Read Status and date ranges (Release/Effective/Expiry)
outcome: I can locate specific instructions efficiently
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I search with any combination of filters, Then I see matching instructions; no criteria returns all. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: to automatically set status to Released when Release Date/Time <= now (and all dates present)
outcome: users receive messages at the right time without manual action
acceptance_criteria: • Given an Approved message with Release <= now and required dates present, Then status becomes Released automatically.

need: to set status to Archived when Expiry <= now and archived flag is true
outcome: expired content is retired from normal view
acceptance_criteria: • Given Expiry <= now and archived flag true, Then the message status becomes Archived.

need: validation that Message ID must not already exist
outcome: duplicate IDs do not collide data
acceptance_criteria: • Given a duplicate Message ID, When I save, Then validation blocks creation.

need: an option to select *All Sites* when submitting new Instructions
outcome: I can target all Primary Message Groups in one action
acceptance_criteria: • Given I choose *All Sites*, Then Sub Types and access options consider all sites.

need: Sub Types dropdown to populate for the selected Primary Message Groups
outcome: I can choose the correct Sub Type context
acceptance_criteria: • Given multiple sites selected, Then Sub Types from those sites are available.

need: to send creation notification to approvers selected on the Instruction and to the Sub Type creation distribution list
outcome: no approver is missed
acceptance_criteria: • Given a message is created, Then both recipient sets receive notifications.

need: to send approval emails to the Sub Type approval distribution list
outcome: stakeholders are informed consistently
acceptance_criteria: • Given a message is approved, Then recipients on the approval distribution list receive the email.

need: to filter maintenance grid by Message Group and Message Sub Type
outcome: I can narrow the working set
acceptance_criteria: • Given I select a Group/Sub Type filter, Then only matching messages are listed.

need: to maintain messages across all Primary Message Groups when I have See All PMG
outcome: I can support multiple sites
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have See All PMG, Then All Site scope is available and returns cross-site items.

need: to list members of a selected BOTD group
outcome: I can manage communications
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list members of a selected Site
outcome: I can view site membership
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list members of a selected User Group
outcome: I can view user group membership
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list members of a selected Watch group
outcome: I can view watch membership
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to view Message Groups associated with a Sector
outcome: I can verify sector mapping
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to view users in a Primary/associated groups and their unread mandatory messages with options for archived/not-yet-effective
outcome: I can monitor compliance
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list unread mandatory messages for a selected user with options for archived/not-yet-effective
outcome: I can follow up with individuals
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to report read type/time and printed flag for a user within a period with options for archived/not-yet-effective
outcome: I can audit reading behaviour
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list users by Role and Primary Message Group
outcome: I can review access allocations
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to display full details for a selected Message ID
outcome: I can inspect configuration of a message
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list updates made by an SAP import
outcome: I can audit import results
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to list users who HAVE / HAVE NOT accessed a selected message
outcome: I can verify message reach
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to report activities for selected groups within a period
outcome: I can monitor my team
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to report activities for my reportees within a period
outcome: I can monitor my direct reports
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have report permission, When I open the report criteria and set filters, Then the report renders in the viewer. • And I can zoom, save, and print from the viewer.

need: to include/exclude archived and not-yet-effective messages
outcome: I can tailor compliance views
acceptance_criteria: • Given I toggle the checkboxes, Then the report includes/excludes those items.

need: a user search that finds by first 3 characters of ID/First/Surname and respects site scope
outcome: I can locate the correct user
acceptance_criteria: • Given I type 3+ characters, Then matching users appear; scope depends on my permission.

need: to define a period for login events included in the report
outcome: I can analyse engagement windows
acceptance_criteria: • Given a date range, Then only logins within that range are included.

need: filters for Role and Primary Message Group
outcome: I can scope the role list
acceptance_criteria: • Given I choose a Role and PMG, Then the report lists matching users.

need: search by first 3 characters of MessageID with site scoping
outcome: I can find the target message
acceptance_criteria: • Given I type 3+ characters, Then candidate IDs show; scope depends on my permission.

need: a selector for HAVE / HAVE NOT accessed the message
outcome: I can see who has read it
acceptance_criteria: • Given I pick HAVE or HAVE NOT, Then the report returns the chosen cohort.

need: a Close button that returns to the criteria page
outcome: I can adjust filters quickly
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click Close in the viewer, Then I return to the criteria screen.

need: to include only users with Include In Report checked
outcome: reports reflect intended cohorts
acceptance_criteria: • Given a user is not flagged Include In Report, Then they are omitted from reports.

need: the defined reporting period to filter both user logins and messages effective within the period
outcome: the report reflects the window accurately
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set a date range, Then only logins and messages effective within the range are included.

need: the defined reporting period to filter both user logins and messages effective within the period for my reportees
outcome: I can review my direct reports accurately
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set a date range, Then only logins and messages effective within the range are included.

need: the report to show whether messages were printed
outcome: print actions are auditable
acceptance_criteria: • Given the report renders, Then a column indicates whether each message was printed.

need: to select a Primary Message Group and associated Message Groups as filters
outcome: I can target a subset
acceptance_criteria: • Given I pick a PMG and associated groups, Then only those users/messages are included.

need: to view my read-only profile (ID, name, group membership, roles)
outcome: I can confirm my access and membership
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I open Current Details, Then I see my ID, name, groups, and roles (read-only). • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: to change my password with enforced complexity rules and success confirmation
outcome: I can update my credentials securely
acceptance_criteria: • Given I provide Old/New/Confirm, When the new password is compliant, Then it is saved and a success screen is shown. • Given non-compliance, When I save, Then validation explains the rule violations.

need: to send feedback with subject/body to the System Administrator
outcome: I can raise issues or suggestions
acceptance_criteria: • Given subject and body are entered, When I click Send, Then the feedback email is sent. • Given missing fields, When I click Send, Then validation prevents submission.

need: to open the User Guide PDF from the menu
outcome: I can self-serve help
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I click User Guide, Then I see the PDF opens within the application. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: password change to enforce length 6–14, 3 of 4 categories, and exclude my ID/First/Surname
outcome: passwords meet policy
acceptance_criteria: • Given I enter a non-compliant password, Then the save is blocked with rule-specific messages. Admin / Configuration User Stories Summary Re q ID Theme Role Need So that Dependenc ies FR - G1 - 01 Administrat ion & Configuratio n System Manager / Administra tor to create, edit, and delete hierarchical Message Groups via a tree and context menu audiences can be modelled correctly None FR - G1 - 02 Administrat ion & Configuratio n System Manager / Administra tor to create, edit, and delete hierarchical Message Group Types with associations to Message Types and Exclusive Membership flag group taxonomy reflects organisation al needs None FR - G1 - 03 Administrat ion & Configuratio n System Manager / Administra tor to create, edit, and delete Message Types with settings (Default Content Type, View Mode, Menu View, Display at Logon, Requires Approval, Searchable, Has Sub Types, Has Effective Date) message behaviours are configurable None FR - G1 - Administrat ion & Configuratio n System Manager / Administra tor to create, edit, and delete Sub Types per Primary Message Group and Message Type with policy and workflows are enforced per category None G2 - 33 Configuratio n Administra tor sensible defaults FR - G2 - 34 Administrat ion & Configuratio n System Manager / Administra tor to specify which Message Types each role can access fine-grained control is possible None Detailed User Stories

need: to create, edit, and delete hierarchical Message Groups via a tree and context menu
outcome: audiences can be modelled correctly
acceptance_criteria: • Given I add a child group, When I save valid details, Then the new node appears in the tree. • Given a group has children/users/messages, When I attempt delete, Then the system blocks deletion with an error.

need: to create, edit, and delete hierarchical Message Group Types with associations to Message Types and Exclusive Membership flag
outcome: group taxonomy reflects organisational needs
acceptance_criteria: • Given I create a type, When I set parent/type fields, Then it is saved and shown in the tree. • Given a type is linked to children or groups, When I delete, Then deletion is blocked.

need: to create, edit, and delete Message Types with settings (Default Content Type, View Mode, Menu View, Display at Logon, Requires Approval, Searchable, Has Sub Types, Has Effective Date)
outcome: message behaviours are configurable
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set required fields, When I save, Then the type is created. • Given a type is in use, When I attempt deletion, Then the system blocks it.

need: to create, edit, and delete Sub Types per Primary Message Group and Message Type with min/max validity and email distributions
outcome: policy and workflows are enforced per category
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set min/max validity days, When I save, Then values are stored and used for validation. • Given a sub type is in use, When I attempt deletion, Then the system blocks it.

need: special Parent option “—Is Parent—” and Message Type option “—All Message Types—” when defining types
outcome: I can create top-level types and types usable across message types
acceptance_criteria: • Given I select “—Is Parent—”, Then the type becomes a parent; • Given “—All Message Types—”, Then it is not restricted.

need: to prevent deleting a Message Group that has child groups
outcome: hierarchy integrity is preserved
acceptance_criteria: • Given a group has children, Then delete is blocked with an explanatory message.

need: to prevent deleting a Message Group referenced by users
outcome: user links remain valid
acceptance_criteria: • Given users reference the group, Then delete is blocked with a warning.

need: to prevent deleting a Message Group referenced by messages
outcome: message links remain valid
acceptance_criteria: • Given messages reference the group, Then delete is blocked with a warning.

need: to prevent deleting a Group Type that has child types
outcome: taxonomy integrity is preserved
acceptance_criteria: • Given a type has children, Then delete is blocked with an error.

need: to prevent deleting a Group Type referenced by any Message Group
outcome: group links remain valid
acceptance_criteria: • Given groups reference the type, Then delete is blocked with an error.

need: to configure whether messages of this type require approval before release
outcome: workflows reflect content type
acceptance_criteria: • Given Requires Approval is off for BOTD type, Then BOTD messages do not require approval to release.

need: to configure whether a message type uses Sub Types
outcome: granularity is optional
acceptance_criteria: • Given Has Sub Types is on, Then Sub Types can be created and used for that type.

need: to configure whether a message type uses an Effective Date
outcome: timing fields fit the content
acceptance_criteria: • Given Has Effective Date is off, Then messages of that type do not require Effective Date.

need: to set the default content type (e.g., Text for BOTD, PDF for Instructions)
outcome: UI and behaviour align to content
acceptance_criteria: • Given Default Content Type is Text, Then BOTD authoring uses text content; • Given PDF, Then uploads are expected.

need: to configure how messages of a type are viewed and where they appear in menus
outcome: navigation is consistent
acceptance_criteria: • Given View Mode/Menu View are set, Then UI reflects those settings.

need: to search for a user and set a new password
outcome: I can restore access securely
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I reset a user password, Then I see validation and success confirmation displayed. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: to create, edit, and delete roles with functional permissions and Message Type access (default role flag)
outcome: access is controlled consistently
acceptance_criteria: • Given I define functions and type access, When I save, Then the role is created/updated. • Given a role is assigned to users, When I delete, Then deletion is blocked.

need: to select an SAP file, preview site-grouped modifications, choose updates, and commit changes
outcome: directory data and sectors stay in sync
acceptance_criteria: • Given a valid SAP file, When I import, Then proposed updates are displayed grouped by site. • Given I select updates and click Save, When processing completes, Then a confirmation shows results and errors if any. FR-G2-4 Theme: Administration & Configuration Dependencies: None As a System Manager / Administrator, I need to create, edit, and delete Sectors (Name, Code, Identification) and link to Message Groups, so that message access aligns to operational sectors Requirement Owner TBD Source User Guide Sec 12.9 Acceptance Criteria: • Given I create a sector with required fields, When I save, Then it appears under the selected Primary Message Group. • Given immutable fields post-creation (Code/Identification/PMG), When I edit, Then only allowed fields are editable.

need: to edit system-wide attributes (pre-effective hours/colour, archive retention, password expiry and warnings, lockout thresholds, notification emails, lock timeout)
outcome: global behaviours can be tuned without code changes
acceptance_criteria: • Given I enter valid values, When I save, Then attributes persist and take effect. • Given invalid values (e.g., non-numeric where numeric required), When I save, Then validation errors are shown.

need: to create, search, list, edit, and delete users; assign roles, message groups, default group; toggle Include in Reports; control SAP import flag
outcome: user access and reporting scope are maintained
acceptance_criteria: • Given I create a user, When saved, Then an initial compliant password is generated and the user must change it at first login. • Given I search by first 3 characters of ID/Name, When results appear, Then I can open Edit and update details.

need: to create, edit, and delete email distribution entries (blocked if linked to a Sub Type)
outcome: notification recipients can be managed centrally
acceptance_criteria: • Given I create or edit an email distribution, When I save, Then it is available for selection. • Given a distribution is linked to a Sub Type, When I delete, Then deletion is blocked with a warning.

need: to curate my list of reportees within my Primary Message Group (and only those flagged Include in Reports)
outcome: my team appears correctly in team reports
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have permission, When I add/remove users between Available and Selected lists, Then my reportees are saved. • Given site scope, When I lack See All PMG permission, Then only my site’s users are shown.

need: enforcement that the user’s Default Message Group must be among their group memberships
outcome: dashboard behaves correctly
acceptance_criteria: • Given Default Group not in memberships, When I save, Then validation blocks the change.

need: to set whether the distribution is used as Email
outcome: routing is explicit
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set the flag, Then the distribution behaves accordingly in notifications.

need: to set the email address for approval notifications
outcome: approval emails reach the right mailbox
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set 'Message Approval Notification Email Address', Then approval notifications are sent there.

need: to set the email address for unapproved-but-effective notifications
outcome: I am alerted to policy breaches
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set 'Notification Email Address', Then unapproved-at-effective emails are sent there.

need: to set who receives account lock emails
outcome: security events are monitored
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set 'User Account Lock Distribution List', Then lock events email that list.

need: to set password expiry in days
outcome: password rotation follows policy
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set Password Expiry Interval, Then users must change passwords at that cadence.

need: to set the warning window before expiry
outcome: users are nudged to change passwords
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set the warning interval, Then users see warnings that many days before expiry.

need: to set the maximum failed login attempts before lockout
outcome: brute-force is mitigated
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set Max Failed Logins, Then lockouts occur after that number of failures.

need: to set how long messages remain after archiving
outcome: storage is controlled
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set Message Archive Retention Period (months), Then archived items purge after that period.

need: to set how long expired messages remain in the system
outcome: expired content lifecycle is governed
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set Expired Message Archive Period (months), Then expired items are retained accordingly.

need: to view a list of available SAP files to import
outcome: I can pick the correct file
acceptance_criteria: • Given available files exist, Then they are listed for selection.

need: to view SAP files rejected due to format errors
outcome: I can correct issues before import
acceptance_criteria: • Given files are malformed, Then they appear under files in error.

need: to expand/collapse site nodes and include/exclude updates per site
outcome: I can stage updates efficiently
acceptance_criteria: • Given site nodes, Then I can expand to view items or collapse to omit a site from import.

need: a Select All option for all updates
outcome: I can apply bulk updates
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click Select All, Then all updates are marked for import.

need: a final confirmation view after saving updates
outcome: I can verify results
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click Save, Then the SAP Process Complete screen summarises results.

need: a confirmation dialog before deleting a Sector
outcome: accidental deletion is avoided
acceptance_criteria: • Given I click Delete on a Sector, Then a confirmation dialog appears; OK deletes, Cancel aborts.

need: a success dialog after Sector deletion
outcome: I receive feedback
acceptance_criteria: • Given deletion succeeds, Then a success dialog is shown.

need: to generate an initial password meeting length/complexity and not containing ID or names
outcome: new accounts are secure
acceptance_criteria: • Given a new user is created, Then the system generates a password: 6–14 chars, 3 of 4 categories, excludes UserID/First/Surname, and forces change at first login.

need: to require password change after an admin reset
outcome: security is maintained
acceptance_criteria: • Given a password is reset, Then the user must change it on next login.

need: to see user suggestions as “First Name, Surname (User ID)”
outcome: I can pick the correct person
acceptance_criteria: • Given I type 3+ characters, Then suggestions display in the specified format.

need: to set the Include In Report flag on user profiles
outcome: reports include only intended users
acceptance_criteria: • Given I toggle Include In Report and save, Then the user appears/disappears from reports accordingly.

need: to set a role as the default role
outcome: new users inherit sensible defaults
acceptance_criteria: • Given I set Default Role, Then new users can be initialised with that role as appropriate.

need: to specify which Message Types each role can access
outcome: fine-grained control is possible
acceptance_criteria: • Given I adjust Message Type access on a role, Then users of that role see only those types.

need: to enforce role-based visibility and access to functions and menus
outcome: users see and do only what they are permitted
acceptance_criteria: • Given a role without a function, When signed in, Then the corresponding menu item is hidden or disabled. • Given a role with a function, When signed in, Then I can access that function successfully.

need: to constrain searches and reports to the user’s site unless See All Primary Message Groups permission is granted
outcome: data privacy and relevance are preserved
acceptance_criteria: • Given I lack the See All PMG permission, When I search users/messages, Then results are scoped to my site. • Given I have the permission, When I search, Then I can see results across sites.

need: to show/hide messages based on Message Group rights (Prohibited/Allowed/Mandatory)
outcome: users see only relevant content and mandatory items are highlighted
acceptance_criteria: • Given Prohibited, When a user is in that group, Then the message is not visible. • Given Allowed, When a user is in that group, Then the message appears in Other Messages. • Given Mandatory, When a user is in that group, Then the message appears in the Mandatory list.

need: to see a validation summary and field-level highlights on invalid input
outcome: I can correct errors before saving
acceptance_criteria: • Given invalid entries, When I save, Then a summary lists issues and fields are highlighted in error. • Given all issues resolved, When I save, Then the record persists.

need: to select dates/times using a date picker control
outcome: I can enter dates accurately and consistently
acceptance_criteria: • Given I have the required permissions, When I click the date picker, Then I see a calendar/time control allows selection and populates the field. • And results/actions are consistent with my role and scope.

need: to optionally enforce that Instruction Display/Print PDF filenames equal the Message ID
outcome: uploaded content maps unambiguously to the message
acceptance_criteria: • Given the config flag is on, When I upload PDFs with mismatched names, Then validation blocks saving. • Given matching names, When I save, Then the Instruction persists.

need: to move items between Available/Selected lists using <, >, <<, >>
outcome: I can assign access and recipients efficiently
acceptance_criteria: • Given two lists, When I click > for selected items, Then those items move to the Selected list. • Given I click <<, When items exist, Then all move back to Available.
